description: Extract public metadata and explicit transcript artifacts from YouTube URLs without letting the LLM browse the page.
allowedOperations: parse video and playlist IDs from URL
use optional YouTube Data API key for videos.list metadata
store transcript only from explicit configured adapters with provenance
blockedOperations: pretend official captions API can download arbitrary public transcripts
hallucinate atomic paper/tool lists from title alone
notes: Transcript adapters must be disabled by default unless user explicitly configures one.
